channel.title: TECK — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on TECK (Teck Resources) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: David Einhorn: TRIMMED TECK (-8%) · Q3 2025
item.description: David Einhorn (Greenlight Capital) trimmed TECK in Q3 2025 · 7.4% of portfolio. Small copper profit-take.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (David Einhorn)
